data.body: 3 new tickets couldn't close: completion gate requires a rebar-ticket trailer referencing each. Added trailers via message-only amends: 563->+401a, 580->+0fb4+bff8 (multi-trailer commits). Message-only=NO_CODE_CHANGE (563 keeps votes); reparented 576/579/580/581 re-CI. Re-pushed. Awaiting green, then close AC1/AC10/AC7 (trailers present) + epic + submit.
